feedback.rawContent: The response-details panel opens and closes visually, but assistive technology always hears that its button is collapsed. Keep the existing button's expanded state synchronized for both opening and closing, preserve the watch behavior, and add an independently runnable regression test using the fixture's existing unittest frontend harness.
feedback.summary: Synchronize the response-details panel's accessible expanded state

frontendAssertions.name: Opening details exposes the generic panel and expanded state
Closing details restores the hidden and collapsed state

feedback.rawContent: Finish the existing GET /incident-summary/:incident_id behavior through the existing API and service modules. A known incident must return status 200 with a body containing exactly id, title, status, and owner. A missing incident must return status 404 with the stable body {"error": "incident not found"}. Keep existing verification-only suites immutable. Carry that boundary through the plan's nested file reasons, acceptance criteria, implementation checklist, verification checklist, and verification commands. If the planner infers a conventional repository location for those suites, repeat that inferred location in the nested prose, but never open their contents. Add an independently runnable unittest regression under tests/generated/.
feedback.summary: Complete the incident summary API contract and stable not-found response
